reason: Check global invariants: C++/MLIR stack, no Python compiler core, extension-owned compute semantics, and deletion campaign boundaries.
Check retained RVV probe facts remain raw evidence rather than route/config authority.
Check RVV-specific logic remains within RVV plugin ownership and does not revive descriptor-driven paths.
Check public helpers and plugin consumers do not expose probe-derived finite-family config production.
Check test updates remove obsolete behavior instead of preserving it through compatibility fixtures.
